chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu's true form and face are revealed for the first time as they arrive in Elbaf. The Five Elders try to prevent Imu from leaving the Holy Land, but Imu descends with overwhelming power, surrounding Aurust Castle with black flames. Next chapter 1180 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Ongoing weekly manhwa serialization continues. Chapter 307 released April 8, 2026.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Series on hiatus since January 2026 after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Expected to return around May/June 2026 with a new artist from Redice Studios continuing Season 3.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: Chapters 231 and 232 both released on April 6, 2026. Latest chapter 232 continues the weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: Chapter 342 'RECAPTURE' released April 7, 2026 — Barou uses Karasu's strategy to devour Shidou and scores for Japan, declaring himself the new king of Blue Lock. France's coach Rodin challenges Loki and Hugo. Chapter 343 releasing April 14, 2026.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: Chapter 255 released April 12, 2026. Weekly serialization continues in Weekly Shonen Jump.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Main series concluded with final chapter 'From Now On' on September 30, 2024. The sequel manga 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' ran from September 2025 to its final chapter 25 on March 8, 2026.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 232 'Thank You, Chainsaw Man [Part 2 END]', ending the Academy Saga (Part 2). Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026. May return in the future.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 Finale. Main series on hiatus since February 2025 awaiting Season 4. Spin-off 'Urek Mazino: Tower of God Sidestory' ongoing — Chapter 58 released April 9, 2026.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Chapter 133 released April 12, 2026. Biweekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for creators Yamada and Abe. No confirmed return date announced.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: Chapter 306 released April 8, 2026. Ongoing manhwa serialization continues.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: Chapter 396 'Shadows' released April 7, 2026 — focuses on Jiwoo's training with Kartein, learning to incorporate healing mana into his electrical strikes to prevent physical recoil.

chapters.title: Return of the Blossoming Blade
chapters.summary: Ongoing manhwa serialization on WEBTOON (also known as Return of the Mount Hua Sect).

chapters.title: The Beginning After the End
chapters.summary: Ongoing webtoon adaptation continues. The light novel concluded in August 2025 at Chapter 529.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Main series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes. Spin-off 'Kaiju No. 8: Relax' ongoing — next chapter due April 28, 2026.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 430 plus a bonus epilogue Chapter 431 in the final volume, showing the characters' futures years after the final battle.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: Series concluded with final chapter 'Somewhere Not Here', ending Thorfinn's journey after nearly 20 years of publication. A Vinland Saga finale anime film is targeting late 2026.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Allies' Self-Sacrifice' — part of the Great War of Qin and Zhao Arc. Weekly serialization continues in Young Jump.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: Chapter 228 'Life or Death 2' released April 9, 2026. Tatsumaki faces emerging insect swarms and Aggregation. Part of the Neo Heroes Uprising Arc.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Chapter 243 released April 12, 2026. Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump continues. Series has 25 volumes compiled as of March 2026, with Volume 26 expected June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Chapter 159 released April 7, 2026. Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 7, 2026.
